hero.title:
No Cap.
No Fake.
hero.subtitle: Built for the concrete. Engineered for the future. Every thread, every seam, every drop is meticulously designed to push boundaries. We believe in extreme typographic contrast, brutalist utility, and gear that speaks louder through its form than its logo. Wear the truth.
welcome.member_desc: SKIP THE LINE. SECURE THE RAREST DROPS. JOIN THE EXCLUSIVE SYNDICATE.
faq.a1: We release limited quantities on a schedule. Once a drop sells out, it's gone for good. Members get early access to select drops.
faq.a2: Membership is free. It gives you early access to drops, exclusive products, and free shipping on all orders.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship globally. Shipping costs and times are calculated at checkout based on your location.
faq.a4: You have 30 days to return your items in original condition. Members get free return shipping.
trust.legit_desc: All releases undergo curated and multi-layered authenticity verification. Zero tolerance for counterfeits.
trust.premium_desc: Curating collections that use heavyweight materials with global standard precision stitching.
trust.dswt_desc: Deadstock with Tags. Guaranteed in brand new condition and 100% perfect during unboxing.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.desc1: We are a premium streetwear brand born in the concrete jungle.
about.desc2: Our mission is to bridge the gap between high-end fashion and everyday utility. Every piece is designed with intent, constructed with premium materials, and tested in the streets.
about.desc_full: Born from the streets of Condong Catur, Sleman. No Cap is more than a brand; it's a movement. We reject the superfluous and embrace the essential. Inspired by brutalist architecture and functional utility, our garments are engineered for those who speak less and do more.

membership.hero_desc: The ultimate key to the culture. Get exclusive access to the rarest drops, member-only products, and free shipping on every order.
membership.faq1_q: What exactly is the No Cap Membership?
membership.faq1_a: It's an exclusive ecosystem designed for true culture enthusiasts. While the Standard tier lets you save items, our Verified and Grail tiers elevate your status, giving you priority access to rare drops before they sell out, along with massive savings on shipping.
membership.faq2_q: Why should I upgrade to Cap Verified?
membership.faq2_a: If you buy at least one item a month, Cap Verified pays for itself. You eliminate all shipping costs and get a 1-hour head start on drops. In the sneaker and streetwear game, 1 hour is the difference between securing your size or paying resale prices.
membership.faq3_q: What is the Grail Status 'Rare Item Guarantee'?
membership.faq3_a: Grail members are guaranteed the right to purchase at least one highly coveted, limited-stock item every month at retail price. No bots, no lotteries, just guaranteed heat.
membership.faq4_q: How does the free shipping work?
membership.faq4_a: It's completely automatic. Once your account is upgraded to Verified or Grail, our checkout system recognizes your tier and instantly deducts all standard shipping fees.
membership.faq5_a: Grail members get access to a hidden section of the store featuring deadstock items, unreleased samples, and restocks of past iconic drops that the general public will never see.
membership.faq6_q: Are the memberships billed monthly? Can I cancel?
membership.faq6_a: Yes, Verified and Grail tiers are billed on a month-to-month basis. There are no long-term contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time right from your dashboard.
membership.faq7_q: Is the upgrade worth it if I only buy occasionally?
membership.faq7_a: Absolutely. Even if you only cop one major drop a year, the early access guarantees you get it for retail. Plus, the flat discounts on Cap Verified and Grail statuses apply instantly.
membership.faq8_q: Do the membership discounts stack with other sales?
membership.faq8_a: Yes, your flat 5% (Verified) or 10% (Grail) discount is applied on top of any seasonal sales we might run, making it the most cost-effective way to shop No Cap.

privacy.title:
Privacy
Policy
privacy.s1.title: Data We Collect
privacy.s1.p1: When you create an account or make a purchase at NOCAP, we collect information you provide directly, including: full name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment information.
privacy.s1.p2: We also automatically collect technical data such as IP address, browser type, operating system, and pages visited for analytics and user experience improvement.
privacy.s2.title: Use of Data
privacy.s2.p1: Your personal information is used to: process orders and shipping, send transaction confirmations, provide account and order notifications, and improve our services and your shopping experience.
privacy.s2.p2: We will not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent.
privacy.s3.title: Cookies & Tracking
privacy.s3.p1: The NOCAP website uses cookies to store user preferences, analyze visitor traffic, and optimize displayed content. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but some website features may not function optimally.
privacy.s3.p2: We use third-party analytics services (such as Google Analytics) that may also place cookies on your device. These services are subject to their respective privacy policies.
privacy.s4.title: Data Security
privacy.s4.p1: We implement reasonable technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. All payment transactions are encrypted using SSL/TLS technology.
privacy.s4.p2: However, no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of the data transmitted to our website.
privacy.s5.title: User Rights
privacy.s5.p1: In accordance with global privacy standards, you have the right to: access your personal data that we store, request corrections of inaccurate data, request deletion of your personal data, and withdraw consent for data processing.
privacy.s5.p2: To exercise these rights, please contact us via the Contact page or send an email to privacy@nocap.id.
privacy.s6.title: Policy Changes
privacy.s6.p1: NOCAP reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any material changes will be communicated via email or website notification. The last updated date will always be displayed at the top of this page.
privacy.cta.desc: Contact us anytime regarding our privacy policy.
terms.title:
Terms of
Service
terms.s1.title: General Terms
terms.s1.p1: By accessing and using the NOCAP website (nocap.id), you agree to be bound by the Terms & Conditions listed on this page. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not continue to use our services.
terms.s1.p2: NOCAP reserves the right to change, add, or remove portions of these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Changes are effective immediately upon publication on this page.
terms.s2.title: User Accounts
terms.s2.p1: To make a purchase, you are required to create an account with accurate and up-to-date information. You are fully responsible for the security of your account credentials (email and password).
terms.s2.p2: NOCAP is not responsible for any losses arising from unauthorized use of your account due to negligence in maintaining account security.
terms.s3.title: Orders & Payments
terms.s3.p1: All prices listed on the website are in Indonesian Rupiah (IDR) and do not include shipping costs unless stated otherwise. NOCAP reserves the right to change product prices without prior notice.
terms.s3.p2: Orders are considered valid after payment is received and confirmed by our system. In the event of a pricing error due to technical issues, NOCAP reserves the right to cancel the order and issue a full refund.
terms.s3.p3: Available payment methods include bank transfer, virtual account, e-wallet, and QRIS according to the options provided by our partner payment gateways.
terms.s4.title: Shipping
terms.s4.p1: Orders will be processed within 1–3 business days after payment confirmation. Estimated shipping time depends on the destination and the selected courier service.
terms.s4.p2: Once the package is handed over to the courier, the risk of loss or damage during transit becomes the courier's responsibility. NOCAP will assist with the claims process if necessary.
terms.s4.p3: For exclusive Drop or pre-order products, shipping schedules will be communicated separately via email or the relevant product page.
terms.s5.title: Returns & Exchanges
terms.s5.p1: Products can be returned or exchanged within 7 calendar days after receipt, provided: the product has never been worn/washed, labels and tags are still intact, and accompanied by proof of purchase (invoice).
terms.s5.p2: Products from Drop collections/limited editions, products labeled FINAL SALE, and exclusive membership products cannot be returned or exchanged unless there is a manufacturing defect.
terms.s5.p3: Return shipping costs are borne by the buyer, unless the return is due to an error by NOCAP (wrong size sent, manufacturing defect, etc.).
terms.s6.title: Intellectual Property Rights
terms.s6.p1: All content on the NOCAP website, including but not limited to: graphic design, logos, typography, product photography, description text, and website source code are the exclusive property of NOCAP and are protected by Intellectual Property laws.
terms.s6.p2: It is strictly forbidden to reproduce, distribute, modify, or use NOCAP content for commercial purposes without our written permission.
terms.s7.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.s7.p1: NOCAP is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, including but not limited to server downtime, data errors, or unauthorized access to user accounts.
terms.s7.p2: NOCAP's maximum liability for any claim arising from the use of the services shall not exceed the total value of the related order.
terms.s8.title: Governing Law
terms.s8.p1: These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes arising will be settled amicably first, and if no agreement is reached, will be resolved through the competent District Court in Indonesia.
terms.cta.desc: Contact us for clarification on our terms and conditions.
shipping.title:
Shipping 
 & Returns
shipping.s1.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.s1.p1: All orders received will be processed within 1-2 business days (Monday-Friday, excluding national holidays). Orders placed after 14:00 WIB will be processed on the next business day.
shipping.s1.p2: We partner with trusted couriers for regular, next-day, and cargo shipping. Shipping costs are automatically calculated at checkout based on package weight and destination.
shipping.s1.p3: Once the package is handed over to the courier, you will receive an email containing a tracking number. Shipping delays caused by the courier are beyond NOCAP's control, but we will help track your order status.
shipping.s2.title: International Shipping
shipping.s2.p1: Currently, NOCAP provides international shipping to select countries in Southeast Asia (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand). Shipping uses standard international expedition with an estimated time of 5-14 business days.
shipping.s2.p2: Customs taxes and import fees are entirely the buyer's responsibility according to the regulations in their respective destination countries.
shipping.s3.title: Return Policy
shipping.s3.p1: We accept product returns within 7 calendar days of receipt. Mandatory return conditions: the product has not been worn, washed, has no perfume/sweat odor, and all hangtags are still fully attached.
shipping.s3.p2: Products from 'Drops' collections (limited edition), Mystery Boxes, and discounted items (Final Sale) CANNOT be returned or exchanged unless a manufacturing defect is proven.
shipping.s3.p3: Return shipping costs from the buyer to the NOCAP warehouse are entirely borne by the buyer, except if the return occurs due to a shipping error by NOCAP (wrong size, wrong model, defect).
shipping.s4.title: Exchange Process
shipping.s4.p1: Size exchanges are permitted if replacement stock is still available. If stock is depleted, we can only offer a refund in the form of Store Credit.
shipping.s4.p2: To initiate the exchange process, please contact our Support team via the Contact page and attach your order number and product photos.
shipping.s5.title: Refunds
shipping.s5.p1: Refunds will be processed after the returned goods arrive at our warehouse and pass quality inspection (1-3 business days).
shipping.s5.p2: Funds will be returned to the original payment method or as Store Credit, depending on your preference and payment gateway terms (credit card/bank refunds take 7-14 business days).
shipping.cta.desc: Contact our support team immediately so we can help track your delivery.
size.title:
Size 
 Guide
size.desc: Please ensure your size fits before purchasing. All NOCAP garments use a streetwear signature 'Oversized Boxy Fit'. If you prefer a regular fit, we recommend dropping 1 size down (Downsize).
